decision.recommendation: Apply if camera specifications, storage solution, installation team, cabling plan, prior CCTV experience, EMD, warranty, and three-year support capability are ready.

beforeApply.label: GST and PAN documents are ready
CCTV installation experience certificate is available
Cabling and installation manpower is available
Three-year onsite support can be provided
EMD amount can be arranged before deadline

source.title: Statutory Documents
source.text: The bidder shall submit valid GST registration certificate and PAN copy with the technical bid.

source.title: Experience Certificate
source.text: The bidder shall submit completion certificate for at least one CCTV installation project in school, college or government premises.

source.title: Earnest Money Deposit
source.text: Earnest Money Deposit of ₹1,10,000 shall be submitted online before the bid due date.

source.title: Camera Specification
source.text: The bidder shall provide IP cameras with minimum 1080p resolution, night vision and required storage support.

source.title: Warranty and Maintenance
source.text: The successful bidder shall provide onsite warranty and maintenance support for 3 years.

eligibility.title: Prior CCTV project experience
eligibility.text: At least one CCTV installation project in school, college or government premises is required.

source.title: Experience Certificate
source.text: The bidder shall submit completion certificate for at least one CCTV installation project in school, college or government premises.

eligibility.title: Technical camera compliance
eligibility.text: IP cameras must support 1080p resolution, night vision and storage support.

source.title: Camera Specification
source.text: The bidder shall provide IP cameras with minimum 1080p resolution, night vision and required storage support.

eligibility.title: Three-year support capability
eligibility.text: Onsite warranty and maintenance support for three years is mandatory.

source.title: Warranty and Maintenance
source.text: The successful bidder shall provide onsite warranty and maintenance support for 3 years.

source.title: Estimated Tender Value
source.text: The estimated tender value is ₹55 lakh including supply, installation, cabling, storage and support.

financials.label: EMD
financials.note: Online payment before bid due date

source.title: Earnest Money Deposit
source.text: Earnest Money Deposit of ₹1,10,000 shall be submitted online before the bid due date.

source.title: Warranty and Maintenance
source.text: The successful bidder shall provide onsite warranty and maintenance support for 3 years.

source.title: AMC Support
source.text: Quarterly preventive maintenance visits and complaint resolution support shall be included during the support period.

source.title: Payment Terms
source.text: Payment shall be released after installation, commissioning, training and acceptance certificate from school authority.

technical.requirement: IP cameras with minimum 1080p resolution and night vision

source.title: Camera Specification
source.text: The bidder shall provide IP cameras with minimum 1080p resolution, night vision and required storage support.

source.title: NVR and Storage
source.text: NVR shall support all supplied cameras with minimum 30 days recording storage at specified resolution.

source.title: Installation and Cabling
source.text: The bidder shall carry out installation, cabling, conduit laying, network configuration and testing at school premises.

source.title: Training
source.text: The bidder shall provide basic training to designated school staff for camera viewing and recording retrieval.

source.title: Warranty and Maintenance
source.text: The successful bidder shall provide onsite warranty and maintenance support for 3 years.

source.title: AMC Support
source.text: Quarterly preventive maintenance visits and complaint resolution support shall be included during the support period.

risks.title: Storage sizing risk
risks.explanation: NVR must support all cameras and 30 days recording storage.

source.title: NVR and Storage
source.text: NVR shall support all supplied cameras with minimum 30 days recording storage at specified resolution.

risks.title: Experience certificate required
risks.explanation: Prior CCTV installation certificate is mandatory for eligibility.

source.title: Experience Certificate
source.text: The bidder shall submit completion certificate for at least one CCTV installation project in school, college or government premises.

risks.title: Three-year support burden
risks.explanation: Onsite maintenance support must be provided for three years.

source.title: Warranty and Maintenance
source.text: The successful bidder shall provide onsite warranty and maintenance support for 3 years.

risks.title: Payment after commissioning
risks.explanation: Payment depends on installation, training and acceptance certificate.

source.title: Payment Terms
source.text: Payment shall be released after installation, commissioning, training and acceptance certificate from school authority.

missingInformation: Exact number of camera points per school area is not listed
Cable route drawings are not provided
Response time for maintenance complaints needs clarification
Whether existing network switches can be used is unclear
departmentQuestions: Will a pre-award site survey be allowed?
What is the exact number of indoor and outdoor camera points?
Is centralized monitoring required at the education department?
What complaint response time is expected during the support period?
Will existing electrical and network infrastructure be available?
proposalDraft:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We are pleased to submit our proposal for CCTV installation and support for public school premises against tender reference EDU/SEC/2026/209. We confirm that we have reviewed the eligibility criteria, technical requirements, financial terms, delivery obligations, and compliance documents mentioned in the tender.

We undertake to submit all required certificates, declarations, financial documents, and technical compliance details as part of the bid. We also confirm our ability to execute the work within the prescribed timeline subject to final award and work order.

Regards,
Authorized Signatory
